items.arguments:
{"file_path":"/Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00178/app/models/schemas.py","content":"from enum import Enum
from typing import List, Optional, Dict, Any
from datetime import datetime
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, field_validator


class SourceChannel(str, Enum):
    """来源渠道"""
    ONLINE_APP = "ONLINE_APP"
    OFFLINE_STORE = "OFFLINE_STORE"
    CUSTOMER_SERVICE = "CUSTOMER_SERVICE"
    THIRD_PARTY = "THIRD_PARTY"


class ProcessAction(str, Enum):
    """处理动作"""
    SUBMIT = "SUBMIT"
    REVIEW = "REVIEW"
    APPROVE = "APPROVE"
    REJECT = "REJECT"
    SUPPLEMENT = "SUPPLEMENT"
    LOCK = "LOCK"


class ProcessStatus(str, Enum):
    """处理状态"""
    PROCESSABLE = "PROCESSABLE"
    NEED_SUPPLEMENT = "NEED_SUPPLEMENT"
    LOCKED = "LOCKED"
    FAILED = "FAILED"


class FailureCategory(str, Enum):
    """失败分类"""
    RULE_HIT = "RULE_HIT"
    MANUAL_REVIEW = "MANUAL_REVIEW"
    DUPLICATE_SUBMIT = "DUPLICATE_SUBMIT"
    VALIDATION_ERROR = "VALIDATION_ERROR"
    SYSTEM_ERROR = "SYSTEM_ERROR"


class DetailItem(BaseModel):
    """明细项"""
    detail_id: str = Field(..., description="明细项唯一ID")
    powerbank_sn: str = Field(..., description="充电宝序列号")
    user_id: str = Field(..., description="用户ID")
    loss_time: datetime = Field(..., description="遗失时间")
    claim_amount: float = Field(..., description="索赔金额", gt=0)
    compensation_amount: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="赔付金额", ge=0)
    material_list: List[str] = Field(default_factory=list, description="已提交材料清单")
    required_materials: List[str] = Field(default_factory=list, description="应提交材料清单")
    device_model: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="设备型号")
    loss_location: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="遗失地点")
    extra: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = Field(default=None, description="扩展字段")


class CompensationRequest(BaseModel):
    """赔付请求"""
    batch_no: str = Field(..., description="批次号", min_length=8, max_length=32)
    source_channel: SourceChannel = Field(..., description="来源渠道")
    process_action: ProcessAction = Field(..., description="处理动作")
    review_opinion: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="复核意见", max_length=500)
    details: List[DetailItem] = Field(..., description="明细项列表", min_length=1)
    operator_id: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="操作人ID")
    request_time: Optional[datetime] = Field(default_factory=datetime.now, description="请求时间")

    @field_validator('batch_no')
    def validate_batch_no(cls, v):
        if not v.replace('_', '').replace('-', '').isalnum():
            raise ValueError("批次号只能包含字母、数字、下划线和连字符")
        return v


class FailureDetail(BaseModel):
    """失败详情"""
    detail_id: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="关联明细项ID")
    failure_category: FailureCategory = Field(..., description="失败分类")
    failure_code: str = Field(..., description="失败代码")
    failure_message: str = Field(..., description="失败描述")
    rule_id: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="命中规则ID")
    rule_name: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="命中规则名称")
    suggestion: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="处理建议")


class SupplementInfo(BaseModel):
    """需补充信息"""
    detail_id: str = Field(..., description="关联明细项ID")
    missing_materials: List[str] = Field(..., description="缺失材料清单")
    supplement_deadline: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="补充截止时间")


class CompensationResponse(BaseModel):
    """赔付响应"""
    trace_id: str = Field(..., description="可追溯编号")
    batch_no: str = Field(..., description="批次号")
    process_status: ProcessStatus = Field(..., description="处理状态")
    processable_count: int = Field(0, description="可办理数量")
    need_supplement_count: int = Field(0, description="需补充数量")
    locked_count: int = Field(0, description="已锁定数量")
    failed_count: int = Field(0, description="失败数量")
    total_count: int = Field(..., description="总数量")
    processable_details: List[DetailItem] = Field(default_factory=list, description="可办理明细")
    need_supplement_details: List[SupplementInfo] = Field(default_factory=list, description="需补充明细")
    locked_details: List[DetailItem] = Field(default_factory=list, description="已锁定明细")
    failure_details: List[FailureDetail] = Field(default_factory=list, description="失败详情列表")
    process_time: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.now, description="处理时间")
    remark: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="备注")
"}

{"file_path":"/Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00178/app/utils/trace_id_generator.py","content":"import uuid
import time
import hashlib
from datetime import datetime


class TraceIdGenerator:
    """可追溯编号生成器

    编号格式: CP-{业务标识}-{时间戳}-{哈希片段}-{随机序列}
    示例: CP-CMP-20240101120000-ABCD1234-E5F6
    """

    BUSINESS_PREFIX = "CP"
    MODULE_CODE = "CMP"

    @classmethod
    def generate(cls, batch_no: str = None, user_id: str = None) -> str:
        """生成可追溯编号

        Args:
            batch_no: 批次号（可选，用于生成关联哈希）
            user_id: 用户ID（可选，用于生成关联哈希）

        Returns:
            可追溯编号字符串
        """
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d%H%M%S")
        millis = int(time.time() * 1000) % 1000

        hash_source = f"{timestamp}{millis}{batch_no or ''}{user_id or ''}{uuid.uuid4().hex}"
        hash_obj = hashlib.md5(hash_source.encode())
        hash_hex = hash_obj.hexdigest().upper()

        hash_segment = hash_hex[:8]
        random_segment = hash_hex[8:12]

        trace_id = f"{cls.BUSINESS_PREFIX}-{cls.MODULE_CODE}-{timestamp}-{hash_segment}-{random_segment}"

        return trace_id

    @classmethod
    def parse_trace_id(cls, trace_id: str) -> dict:
        """解析可追溯编号

        Args:
            trace_id: 可追溯编号

        Returns:
            解析后的信息字典
        """
        try:
            parts = trace_id.split("-")
            if len(parts) != 5:
                raise ValueError("无效的追溯编号格式")

            business_prefix, module_code, timestamp, hash_segment, random_segment = parts

            dt = datetime.strptime(timestamp, "%Y%m%d%H%M%S")

            return {
                "business_prefix": business_prefix,
                "module_code": module_code,
                "timestamp": timestamp,
                "datetime": dt,
                "hash_segment": hash_segment,
                "random_segment": random_segment,
                "is_valid": business_prefix == cls.BUSINESS_PREFIX and module_code == cls.MODULE_CODE
            }
        except Exception as e:
            return {
                "trace_id": trace_id,
                "is_valid": False,
                "error": str(e)
            }

    @classmethod
    def validate(cls, trace_id: str) -> bool:
        """验证追溯编号是否有效

        Args:
            trace_id: 可追溯编号

        Returns:
            是否有效
        """
        parsed = cls.parse_trace_id(trace_id)
        return parsed.get("is_valid", False)
"}

{"file_path":"/Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00178/app/services/validator.py","content":"from typing import List, Tuple, Optional
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from app.models.schemas import (
    CompensationRequest, DetailItem, FailureDetail,
    FailureCategory, SourceChannel, ProcessAction
)


class DataValidator:
    """数据校验服务

    负责请求参数合法性校验，包括：
    - 必填字段校验
    - 格式规范校验
    - 业务逻辑校验
    - 边界条件校验
    """

    POWERBANK_SN_PATTERN_PREFIXES = ['PB', 'CH', 'SP']
    MAX_CLAIM_AMOUNT = 10000.0
    MAX_SUPPLEMENT_DAYS = 30

    @classmethod
    def validate_request(cls, request: CompensationRequest) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验整个请求

        Args:
            request: 赔付请求

        Returns:
            校验失败详情列表，空列表表示全部通过
        """
        failures = []

        batch_failures = cls._validate_batch(request)
        failures.extend(batch_failures)

        channel_failures = cls._validate_source_channel(request)
        failures.extend(channel_failures)

        action_failures = cls._validate_process_action(request)
        failures.extend(action_failures)

        detail_ids = set()
        for detail in request.details:
            detail_failures = cls._validate_detail(detail)
            failures.extend(detail_failures)

            if detail.detail_id in detail_ids:
                failures.append(FailureDetail(
                    detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                    failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                    failure_code="VLD_DUP_001",
                    failure_message=f"明细项ID重复: {detail.detail_id}",
                    suggestion="请检查明细项ID，确保唯一"
                ))
            detail_ids.add(detail.detail_id)

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_batch(cls, request: CompensationRequest) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验批次号"""
        failures = []
        batch_no = request.batch_no

        if len(batch_no) < 8:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_BAT_001",
                failure_message=f"批次号长度不足，当前长度: {len(batch_no)}，最小长度: 8",
                suggestion="请输入不少于8位的批次号"
            ))

        if len(batch_no) > 32:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_BAT_002",
                failure_message=f"批次号长度超限，当前长度: {len(batch_no)}，最大长度: 32",
                suggestion="请输入不超过32位的批次号"
            ))

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_source_channel(cls, request: CompensationRequest) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验来源渠道"""
        failures = []

        valid_channels = [e.value for e in SourceChannel]
        if request.source_channel.value not in valid_channels:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_CHN_001",
                failure_message=f"无效的来源渠道: {request.source_channel}",
                suggestion=f"请选择有效的来源渠道: {', '.join(valid_channels)}"
            ))

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_process_action(cls, request: CompensationRequest) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验处理动作"""
        failures = []

        valid_actions = [e.value for e in ProcessAction]
        if request.process_action.value not in valid_actions:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_ACT_001",
                failure_message=f"无效的处理动作: {request.process_action}",
                suggestion=f"请选择有效的处理动作: {', '.join(valid_actions)}"
            ))

        if request.process_action in [ProcessAction.APPROVE, ProcessAction.REJECT, ProcessAction.REVIEW]:
            if not request.review_opinion or len(request.review_opinion.strip()) == 0:
                failures.append(FailureDetail(
                    failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                    failure_code="VLD_ACT_002",
                    failure_message=f"处理动作为{request.process_action.value}时，复核意见不能为空",
                    suggestion="请填写复核意见后再提交"
                ))

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_detail(cls, detail: DetailItem) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验单个明细项"""
        failures = []

        id_failures = cls._validate_detail_id(detail)
        failures.extend(id_failures)

        sn_failures = cls._validate_powerbank_sn(detail)
        failures.extend(sn_failures)

        user_failures = cls._validate_user_id(detail)
        failures.extend(user_failures)

        time_failures = cls._validate_loss_time(detail)
        failures.extend(time_failures)

        amount_failures = cls._validate_amounts(detail)
        failures.extend(amount_failures)

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_detail_id(cls, detail: DetailItem) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验明细项ID"""
        failures = []

        if not detail.detail_id or len(detail.detail_id.strip()) == 0:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_DTL_001",
                failure_message="明细项ID不能为空",
                suggestion="请填写明细项ID"
            ))
        elif len(detail.detail_id) > 64:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_DTL_002",
                failure_message=f"明细项ID长度超限: {len(detail.detail_id)}，最大长度: 64",
                suggestion="明细项ID请控制在64字符以内"
            ))

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_powerbank_sn(cls, detail: DetailItem) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验充电宝序列号"""
        failures = []
        sn = detail.powerbank_sn

        if not sn or len(sn.strip()) == 0:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_SN_001",
                failure_message="充电宝序列号不能为空",
                suggestion="请填写充电宝序列号"
            ))
            return failures

        valid_prefix = False
        for prefix in cls.POWERBANK_SN_PATTERN_PREFIXES:
            if sn.startswith(prefix):
                valid_prefix = True
                break

        if not valid_prefix:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_SN_002",
                failure_message=f"充电宝序列号格式错误: {sn}，应以{', '.join(cls.POWERBANK_SN_PATTERN_PREFIXES)}开头",
                suggestion="请检查充电宝序列号格式"
            ))

        if len(sn) < 8:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_SN_003",
                failure_message=f"充电宝序列号长度不足: {len(sn)}，最小长度: 8",
                suggestion="请输入完整的充电宝序列号"
            ))

        if len(sn) > 32:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_SN_004",
                failure_message=f"充电宝序列号长度超限: {len(sn)}，最大长度: 32",
                suggestion="请检查充电宝序列号是否正确"
            ))

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_user_id(cls, detail: DetailItem) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验用户ID"""
        failures = []

        if not detail.user_id or len(detail.user_id.strip()) == 0:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_USR_001",
                failure_message="用户ID不能为空",
                suggestion="请填写用户ID"
            ))

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_loss_time(cls, detail: DetailItem) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验遗失时间"""
        failures = []
        loss_time = detail.loss_time

        if not loss_time:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_LTM_001",
                failure_message="遗失时间不能为空",
                suggestion="请填写遗失时间"
            ))
            return failures

        now = datetime.now()

        if loss_time > now:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_LTM_002",
                failure_message=f"遗失时间不能晚于当前时间: {loss_time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}",
                suggestion="请检查遗失时间是否正确"
            ))

        earliest_allowed = now - timedelta(days=365)
        if loss_time < earliest_allowed:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_LTM_003",
                failure_message=f"遗失时间超出追溯期限: {loss_time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}，仅支持1年内的遗失申请",
                suggestion="遗失时间超过1年的申请需走特殊审批流程"
            ))

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def _validate_amounts(cls, detail: DetailItem) -> List[FailureDetail]:
        """校验金额"""
        failures = []

        if detail.claim_amount <= 0:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_AMT_001",
                failure_message=f"索赔金额必须大于0，当前值: {detail.claim_amount}",
                suggestion="请填写正确的索赔金额"
            ))

        if detail.claim_amount > cls.MAX_CLAIM_AMOUNT:
            failures.append(FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                failure_code="VLD_AMT_002",
                failure_message=f"索赔金额超过最大限额: {detail.claim_amount}，最大限额: {cls.MAX_CLAIM_AMOUNT}",
                suggestion="超过限额的申请需走特殊审批流程"
            ))

        if detail.compensation_amount is not None:
            if detail.compensation_amount < 0:
                failures.append(FailureDetail(
                    detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                    failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                    failure_code="VLD_AMT_003",
                    failure_message=f"赔付金额不能为负数: {detail.compensation_amount}",
                    suggestion="请填写正确的赔付金额"
                ))

            if detail.compensation_amount > detail.claim_amount:
                failures.append(FailureDetail(
                    detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                    failure_category=FailureCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR,
                    failure_code="VLD_AMT_004",
                    failure_message=f"赔付金额不能大于索赔金额: {detail.compensation_amount} > {detail.claim_amount}",
                    suggestion="赔付金额应小于或等于索赔金额"
                ))

        return failures

    @classmethod
    def check_missing_materials(cls, detail: DetailItem) -> List[str]:
        """检查缺失的材料

        Args:
            detail: 明细项

        Returns:
            缺失的材料清单
        """
        if not detail.required_materials:
            return []

        submitted = set(m.strip().upper() for m in detail.material_list)
        required = set(m.strip().upper() for m in detail.required_materials)

        missing = required - submitted
        return list(missing)

{"file_path":"/Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00178/app/services/rule_engine.py","content":"from typing import List, Dict, Optional, Callable, Tuple
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from app.models.schemas import (
    DetailItem, FailureDetail, FailureCategory, SourceChannel
)


class Rule:
    """规则定义"""

    def __init__(
        self,
        rule_id: str,
        rule_name: str,
        rule_type: str,
        check_func: Callable,
        failure_code: str,
        failure_message: str,
        suggestion: str,
        priority: int = 0,
        enabled: bool = True
    ):
        self.rule_id = rule_id
        self.rule_name = rule_name
        self.rule_type = rule_type
        self.check_func = check_func
        self.failure_code = failure_code
        self.failure_message = failure_message
        self.suggestion = suggestion
        self.priority = priority
        self.enabled = enabled

    def check(self, detail: DetailItem, context: Dict = None) -> Optional[FailureDetail]:
        """执行规则检查"""
        if not self.enabled:
            return None

        context = context or {}
        is_violated = self.check_func(detail, context)

        if is_violated:
            return FailureDetail(
                detail_id=detail.detail_id,
                failure_category=FailureCategory.RULE_HIT,
                failure_code=self.failure_code,
                failure_message=self.failure_message,
                rule_id=self.rule_id,
                rule_name=self.rule_name,
                suggestion=self.suggestion
            )

        return None


class RuleEngine:
    """规则引擎

    负责业务规则判断和阈值检测，包括：
    - 赔付金额阈值规则
    - 用户历史赔付规则
    - 黑名单规则
    - 高风险设备规则
    - 高风险地区规则
    - 频繁申请规则
    - 人工复核规则
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self._rules: List[Rule] = []
        self._init_default_rules()

    def _init_default_rules(self):
        """初始化默认规则"""

        def check_amount_threshold(detail, context):
            """金额阈值规则：单台赔付超过200元需人工复核"""
            threshold = context.get('high_amount_threshold', 200.0)
            claim_amount = detail.compensation_amount or detail.claim_amount
            return claim_amount > threshold

        def check_frequent_loss(detail, context):
            """频繁遗失规则：用户90天内遗失超过3次"""
            user_loss_history = context.get('user_loss_history', {})
            user_id = detail.user_id
            loss_count = user_loss_history.get(user_id, {}).get('count_90d', 0)
            return loss_count >= 3

        def check_blacklist_user(detail, context):
            """黑名单规则：用户在黑名单中"""
            blacklist = context.get('user_blacklist', [])
            return detail.user_id in blacklist

        def check_high_risk_device(detail, context):
            """高风险设备规则：设备型号存在异常高遗失率"""
            high_risk_models = context.get('high_risk_models', [])
            return detail.device_model in high_risk_models

        def check_high_risk_location(detail, context):
            """高风险地区规则：遗失地点为高风险区域"""
            high_risk_locations = context.get('high_risk_locations', [])
            return detail.loss_location in high_risk_locations

        def check_total_compensation(detail, context):
            """累计赔付规则：用户累计赔付超过500元"""
            user_loss_history = context.get('user_loss_history', {})
            user_id = detail.user_id
            total_comp = user_loss_history.get(user_id, {}).get('total_compensation', 0)
            current_amount = detail.compensation_amount or detail.claim_amount
            return (total_comp + current_amount) > 500

        def check_same_device_loss(detail, context):
            """同设备重复遗失规则：同一设备180天内重复遗失"""
            device_loss_history = context.get('device_loss_history', {})
            sn = detail.powerbank_sn
            last_loss_time = device_loss_history.get(sn, {}).get('last_loss_time')
            if last_loss_time:
                if isinstance(last_loss_time, str):
                    last_loss_time = datetime.fromisoformat(last_loss_time.replace('Z', '+00:00'))
                days_diff = (detail.loss_time - last_loss_time).days
                return days_diff <= 180
            return False

        def check_manual_review_required(detail, context):

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

def create_detail_item(
    detail_id="DTL001",

    user_id="USR001",
    claim_amount=99.0,
    compensation_amount=None,
    material_list=None,

):

class TestComplianceCases:
    """合规样例测试"""

    def test_normal_compliant_case_single_item(self):
        """测试：单条明细合规样例 - 可办理"""
        detail = create_detail_item(
            detail_id="DTL001",
            claim_amount=99.0,
            compensation_amount=99.0
        )
        request = CompensationRequest(
            batch_no="BATCH20240101001",
            source_channel=SourceChannel.ONLINE_APP,
            process_action=ProcessAction.SUBMIT,
            details=[detail],
            operator_id="OPR001"
        )

        response = client.post(
            "/api/compensation/process",
            json=request.model_dump(mode='json')
        )

        assert response.status_code == 200
        data = response.json()

        assert data["process_status"] == ProcessStatus.PROCESSABLE.value
        assert data["processable_count"] == 1
        assert data["total_count"] == 1
        assert data["failed_count"] == 0
        assert data["need_supplement_count"] == 0
        assert data["locked_count"] == 0
        assert len(data["processable_details"]) == 1
        assert len(data["failure_details"]) == 0
        assert TraceIdGenerator.validate(data["trace_id"])

    def test_compliant_case_multiple_items(self):
        """测试：多条明细合规样例 - 全部可办理"""
        details = [
            create_detail_item(detail_id="DTL001", claim_amount=50.0),
            create_detail_item(detail_id="DTL002", powerbank_sn="PB87654321", claim_amount=100.0, user_id="USR002"),
            create_detail_item(detail_id="DTL003", powerbank_sn="CH11223344", claim_amount=80.0, user_id="USR003"),
        ]
        request = CompensationRequest(
            batch_no="BATCH20240101002",
            source_channel=SourceChannel.OFFLINE_STORE,
            process_action=ProcessAction.SUBMIT,
            details=details
        )

        response = client.post(
            "/api/compensation/process",
            json=request.model_dump(mode='json')
        )

        assert response.status_code == 200
        data = response.json()

        assert data["process_status"] == ProcessStatus.PROCESSABLE.value
        assert data["processable_count"] == 3
        assert data["total_count"] == 3
        assert data["failed_count"] == 0


class TestThresholdCases:
    """超阈值样例测试"""

    def test_high_amount_threshold(self):
        """测试：单台赔付超过200元 - 需人工复核"""
        detail = create_detail_item(
            detail_id="DTL001",
            claim_amount=299.0,
            compensation_amount=299.0
        )
        request = CompensationRequest(
            batch_no="BATCH20240101003",
            source_channel=SourceChannel.ONLINE_APP,
            process_action=ProcessAction.SUBMIT,
            details=[detail]
        )

        response = client.post(
            "/api/compensation/process",
            json=request.model_dump(mode='json')
        )

        assert response.status_code == 200
        data = response.json()

        assert data["process_status"] == ProcessStatus.FAILED.value
        assert data["failed_count"] == 1
        assert len(data["failure_details"]) == 1
        failure = data["failure_details"][0]
        assert failure["failure_category"] == FailureCategory.MANUAL_REVIEW.value
        assert failure["failure_code"] == "RUL_AMT_001"
        assert "超过阈值" in failure["failure_message"]
        assert failure["rule_id"] == "RULE_AMT_001"

    def test_max_claim_amount_boundary(self):
        """测试：索赔金额边界值 - 刚好等于阈值10000元"""
        detail = create_detail_item(
            detail_id="DTL001",
            claim_amount=10000.0
        )
        request = CompensationRequest(
            batch_no="BATCH20240101004",

    def test_exceed_max_claim_amount(self):
        """测试：索赔金额超过最大限额 - 10001元"""
        detail = create_detail_item(
            detail_id="DTL001",
            claim_amount=10001.0
        )
        request = CompensationRequest(
            batch_no="BATCH20240101005",
            source_channel=SourceChannel.ONLINE_APP,

        )

        assert data["process_status"] == ProcessStatus.FAILED.value
        failure = data["failure_details"][0]
        assert failure["failure_code"] == "VLD_AMT_002"
        assert "超过最大限额" in failure["failure_message"]

    def test_frequent_loss_user(self):
        """测试：用户90天内遗失超过3次 - 需人工复核"""
        user_id = "USR_FREQ"
        for i in range(3):
            storage.record_user_loss(
                user_id=user_id,
                loss_time=datetime.now() - timedelta(days=30 - i * 5),

        )

        assert "RUL_FRQ_001" in failure_codes

        user_id = "USR_TOTAL"
